reasoning: There is overwhelming, convergent evidence that Haley Stevens has either already officially announced or is effectively launching any moment before May 1, 2025. Multiple high-quality reports from mid-April (including Punchbowl News and CNN on April 10-11) confirmed she had moved up her timeline and was intending to launch "in the coming days," specifically noting she had previously planned for "the end of April" (which falls exactly before the May 1 deadline). Additionally, web search results for her verified X (Twitter) profile and campaign website (haleyformi.com) already display explicit announcement text, such as: "It's official, Michigan. I'm running to be your next United States senator" and platform details about standing up to the "Trump-Musk chaos agenda" (confirming the 2025 context). Since she has active campaign assets stating she is running and a widely-reported imminent launch window set before the end of April, a YES resolution is near certain. A very slim margin of doubt is reserved for extreme black swan events (e.g. sudden severe illness) that could delay a formal press declaration past May 1.
